name: Round Steak Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Round steak, cut into 1/2 inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the round steak lightly with garlic salt, salt, and pepper.
2. Cut the steak into serving pieces and place in a Crock-POT.
3. Add sliced onion to the pot.
4. Include potatoes (if using) and green beans.
5. Top with tomato soup and tomatoes.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 8 hours.
7. Remove the cover during the last half-hour if too much liquid has developed.
